title: Add duplicate push guard
summary: Agent proposes an extra duplicate push branch, but the node id collides with the existing notification node.

validationEvidence.label: Duplicate push branch check
validationEvidence.details: The proposal attempts to add notify-preview, which already exists in the workflow.

validationEvidence.label: No automatic simulation on accept
validationEvidence.details: Accept only transforms the workflow draft; simulation remains an explicit caller action.
